channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US says it attacked Iran’s Qeshm Island; Tehran targets Kuwait, Bahrain
item.description: The US military says it carried out ‘self-defence’ strikes on Iran’s Qeshm Island.

item.title: Zimbabwe’s e-tricycle crackdown puts rural women’s livelihoods at risk
item.description: Zimbabwe’s e-tricycle scheme for rural women is being squeezed by high fees, licensing rules and police enforcement.

item.title: Why women go to war
item.description: The untold story of women on the battlefield.

item.title: Trump to attend delayed White House Correspondents’ Dinner after shooting
item.description: Press freedom advocates, however, have warned that the dinner could give Trump a podium to attack the news media.

item.title: Thailand cracks down on foreign companies using fig leaf of local ownership
item.description: Thai authorities are ramping up enforcement of local ownership rules, stoking anxiety among foreign businesses.

item.title: Iran war live: US hits Iran’s Qeshm, says Tehran targeted Kuwait, Bahrain
item.description: US President Trump reported to lash out at Israeli PM Netanyahu over Israel’s threat to strike Beirut suburbs.

item.title: Rania al‑Abbasi’s children: The truth revealed
item.description: Syrian commission confirms the deaths of Rania al-Abbasi’s six children, missing under Bashar al-Assad’s rule.

item.title: Italy celebrates 80 years of democracy
item.description: A colossal 400-kilogram flag was draped over Rome’s Colosseum as Italy marked the 80th anniversary of its republic.

item.title: Actor Idris Elba knighted by King Charles at Windsor Castle
item.description: British actor Idris Elba was knighted by King Charles III at Windsor Castle on Tuesday.

item.title: Protesters use ‘Ebola coffin’ to rally against US quarantine centre
item.description: Demonstrators in Nairobi have carried an ‘Ebola’ coffin to protest a proposed US quarantine facility.

item.title: European election monitor dismisses rumours of fraud in Colombia’s election
item.description: The electoral mission described the first round of voting in Colombia's presidential race as 'a lesson in democracy'.

item.title: Trump berated Netanyahu? Analysts question US-Israel feud rumours
item.description: Analysts say 'strategic leaks' aim to influence public perceptions amid diplomatic impasse in US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Drones light up Taipei’s night sky for Computex trade show
item.description: Drones lit up the evening sky near Taiwan’s Taipei 101 skyscraper in a dazzling display for the Computex trade show.

item.title: Trump administration scraps $1.8bn ‘anti-weaponisation fund’
item.description: US Justice Department, however, plans to keep a settlement provision to bar audits of Trump's past tax records.

item.title: Russia launches massive overnight attack on Ukraine
item.description: Russia launched a massive overnight attack on cities across Ukraine, killing at least 22 people including children.

item.title: ‘Milestone’: Macron opens Paris monument honouring Rwanda genocide victims
item.description: President Macron, acknowledging France's 'responsibility' in the genocide, calls memorial a reconciliation 'milestone'.

item.title: What to know about Tuesday’s primaries in California, New Jersey, Montana
item.description: Voters in six US states are casting primary ballots that will set the battle lines for November's midterm elections.

item.title: Blue Origin failure sets back NASA lunar goals
item.description: Blue Origin’s latest rocket test didn’t just end in a fireball — it may have burned a hole in NASA’s timeline.

item.title: Inside the billion-dollar business of getting a visa
item.description: An investigation reveals how visa giant VFS Global profits from millions of visa applications from the Global South.

item.title: Spain bans DR Congo World Cup warm-up due to Ebola fears
item.description: Spanish mayor bans DR Congo pre-World Cup 2026 game in La Linea de la Concepcion due to Ebola fears.

item.title: Palestine weekly wrap: No respite for Eid as Israel kills dozens in Gaza
item.description: International isolation has deepened after reports of sexual abuse and the widening seizure of Gaza territory.

item.title: Lebanon hopes crunch talks in Washington will halt an Israeli invasion
item.description: What will Israel and Lebanon discuss in Washington, as Hezbollah and Israel continue to battle in south Lebanon.

item.title: Who are the best young players to watch at FIFA World Cup 2026?
item.description: Al Jazeera counts down the top young footballers who could emerge as global names at the tournament in North America.

item.title: US says Iran’s new supreme leader alive and ‘increasingly engaging’
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei is increasingly engaging in negotiations.

item.title: Israeli settlers torch Palestinian homes in village near Ramallah
item.description: Khirbet Abu Falah has been frequently targeted by settler attacks, with over 30 incidents reported since late March.
